title: Final ESR Findings (report 05)
description: The host model writes internal/esr-findings.json; build_report.py renders it to 05_Final_ESR.pdf. The Final ESR is concise, evaluator-style, and bullet-structured. It evaluates the proposal as submitted and MUST NOT contain rewriting suggestions, replacement text, or suggested improvements.

criteria.description: One entry per criterion, in order: Excellence, Impact, Implementation.

score.description: Official criterion score, 0.0–5.0 in 0.5 steps. Holistic HE-ESR judgment against the criterion's Core Evaluation Expectations and the General Scoring Logic bands (ESR_WRITING_RULES.md §5); reflects how convincingly the core expectations are satisfied, evidence quality, and severity of shortcomings — not a tally of checkpoint statuses. Enhancing/bonus gaps do not by themselves lower the score.

strengths.description: Most important criterion-level strengths, as short bullets.

weaknesses.description: Most important criterion-level weaknesses, as short bullets.

evaluator_comment.description: Concise evaluator-style comment as bullets (list) or a single string. No suggested improvements.

comment.description: LEGACY: flat evaluator-style paragraph. Still rendered for backward compatibility when the bullet fields (strengths/weaknesses/evaluator_comment) are absent. Prefer the bullet fields.

total_score.description: Total across the three criteria, /15.0. If omitted, the renderer sums the criterion scores.

overall.description: Concise overall assessment as bullets (list) or a single string (legacy).
